metadata.name: Process a New Vendor Setup Request

description: A department wants to purchase from a new vendor. AP needs to set up the vendor in the system before a PO can be issued.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new vendor request form, which includes the vendor's name, address, and banking information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives all necessary vendor details.

nodes.task_description: Verify the vendor's tax ID against the IRS database to ensure legitimacy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the vendor's tax ID is valid.

nodes.task_description: Create the new vendor record in the ERP system's vendor master file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new vendor record.

nodes.task_description: Notify the requesting department that the vendor has been set up and they can now request a purchase order.
